Risk_Description: Reporter email or contact information may be visible to public users
Mitigation_Action: Hide personal contact details from public pages and allow access only to authorized administrators

Risk_Description: Unauthorized users may access or modify item status
Mitigation_Action: Implement user authentication and role-based access control for administrator functions

Risk_Description: Users may upload copyrighted images without permission
Mitigation_Action: Provide upload guidelines and accept only original or authorized images

Risk_Description: Users may submit fake or misleading lost and found reports
Mitigation_Action: Allow administrators to review, verify, and remove suspicious reports

Risk_Description: Duplicate lost or found reports may confuse users and staff
Mitigation_Action: Check for duplicate submissions and allow administrators to merge duplicate records

Risk_Description: Uploaded item photos may reveal student faces or personal information
Mitigation_Action: Provide photo upload guidelines and review uploaded images before publication

Risk_Description: Users may have difficulty finding items because of unclear search filters or locations
Mitigation_Action: Improve search filters by adding item categories campus buildings and clearer location labels
